DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-09-2020 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED THE TRUTH OF MATTERS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT AYERS (NOT COUNSEL) ARE GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED ON THE MERITS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT REBECCA@GREYRESOLUTION.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA GREY; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Motion For Order Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters
Off Calendar Sep-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Matters Admitted and Sanctions against Defendant Ayers (not counsel) are GRANTED as unopposed on the merits.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order and e-mail it to the judge pro tem at rebecca@greyresolution.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
